entries.title: Homily on Acts 54 on acts 28:14
entries.excerpt: "Where we found brethren, and were desired to tarry with them seven days: and so we went toward Rome." Already the preaching has reached to Sicily: see how it has run through even to those lands: at Puteoli also they found some: others also came to meet them. Such was the eagerness of the brethren, it nothing disconcerted them, that Paul was in bonds.

entries.title: Homily on Acts 54 on acts 28:14
entries.excerpt: Observe them tarrying a while, and again hasting onwards.
